productDisplayName: French Connection Women Brown Alexandra Handbag
description: Style Note This french connection piece nails all the season's bag trends perfectly - carry this to add a refined dimension to any simple outfit. A necessary indulgence, which is sure to become a love-forever classic in your collection, this bag hits all the fashion notes just right. Product Details Light brown bag with one main compartment with a magnetic buttoned closure, an inner zipped pocket and a zipped separator One pocket on the front with press down clasps Two short handles for carrying at ease Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Material and Care Shell: 100% polyurethane, Lining: 100% polyester Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size Height:36 cm Width: 40 cm Depth: 15 cm
